subtitles.original: 限界突破っぱらっぱっぱっぱっぱらっぱ
subtitles.english: Breaking limits, papparappappappapparappa

subtitles.original: 明日の私に幸あれ
subtitles.english: May happiness come to the me of tomorrow

subtitles.original: 最敵温度　塞ぎ切るゴースト
subtitles.english: Optimum temperature, a blocking ghost

subtitles.original: 八百万の穏やかな的外要素
subtitles.english: Eight million gentle, off-target elements

subtitles.original: 何の気ないと　超あっけらかん
subtitles.english: Innocently, super nonchalant

subtitles.original: 悪気もなく邪魔するどっかの誰かにバイバイバイ
subtitles.english: Say bye-bye-bye to that someone who's getting in the way without malice

subtitles.original: 自分時間　堕落タイム確保　5時～9時は死守しますと
subtitles.english: Securing my own time for depravity, I'll defend 5 to 9 at all costs

subtitles.original: さらに甘い恋や甘い夢を忘れずに　とどのつまり
subtitles.english: And not forgetting sweet love and sweet dreams, in the end

subtitles.original: オーバーワークは立ち入り禁止ですよって注意喚起もしてますよ
subtitles.english: I'm also issuing a warning that overwork is strictly prohibited

subtitles.original: ねぇ楽して　上手くして　生きてくってもどかしいな
subtitles.english: Hey, trying to live an easy and successful life is so frustrating

subtitles.original: だって安定裏技一回きり　甘い蜜に罠がある　イェイ！
subtitles.english: Because stable cheats are one-time only, there's a trap in the sweet nectar. Yay!

subtitles.original: 眠くなったら寝る
subtitles.english: Sleep when sleepy

subtitles.original: お昼過ぎに起きる
subtitles.english: Wake up after noon

subtitles.original: 遊びたくて遊ぶ
subtitles.english: Play because I want to play

subtitles.original: お腹減ったらご飯を食べる
subtitles.english: Eat when hungry

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったら笑う
subtitles.english: Laugh when happy

subtitles.original: 悲しかったら泣いてもいいんじゃない
subtitles.english: Isn't it okay to cry when sad?

subtitles.original: 明日の私のために今日もなんとか頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: For the sake of the me of tomorrow, I'll somehow do my best today

subtitles.original: 明日も頑張らなくていいように頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: I'll do my best so that I don't have to do my best tomorrow

subtitles.original: 総括じゃないやこれ多分そうだ　ないやいやることやってます
subtitles.english: It's not a summary, yeah this is probably it, I'm doing what I need to do

subtitles.original: What's & Bad 誰に知られなくたって別にいいから
subtitles.english: What's & Bad, I don't care if nobody knows

subtitles.original: 私には私のマイルール　明日楽するためにはハイチーズ
subtitles.english: I have my own rules, say 'cheese' to make tomorrow easy

subtitles.original: 意外とこんな感じでラブアンドピースのある毎日を生きたいのです
subtitles.english: Surprisingly, I want to live every day with love and peace like this

subtitles.original: Don't be shy 　ドキドキしたい　ドキドキしたい
subtitles.english: Don't be shy, I want to feel excited, I want to feel excited

subtitles.original: Let me shine 明日天気に慣れ
subtitles.english: Let me shine, hope it's sunny tomorrow

subtitles.original: To be excite 心もっと踊りたい
subtitles.english: To be excited, I want my heart to dance more

subtitles.original: Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday 木金土日　イェイ！
subtitles.english: Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thu-Fri-Sat-Sun Yay!

subtitles.original: 辛くなったら歌う
subtitles.english: Sing when it gets hard

subtitles.original: むかついたら愚痴る
subtitles.english: Grumble when annoyed

subtitles.original: やりたいようにやる
subtitles.english: Do as I want

subtitles.original: それができたら苦労しないわ
subtitles.english: If I could do that, I wouldn't be struggling

subtitles.original: 常に一喜一憂　してりゃ何でありゃと思たんから
subtitles.english: Always fluctuating between joy and sorrow, thinking 'what was that' about everything

subtitles.original: 適度にセーブしディスは回避してまぁ頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: Save moderately, avoid disses, and well, do my best

subtitles.original: 適当にまでは言わないがまぁ頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: I won't go as far as saying 'carelessly', but well, I'll do my best

subtitles.original: 夢の中ではずっとぐうたらしてやるんだ
subtitles.english: In my dreams, I'm going to be lazy all the time

subtitles.original: 誰かのためとかそんなんじゃなく明日の私のため Fight!
subtitles.english: Not for someone else, but for the me of tomorrow, Fight!

subtitles.original: 楽するために苦しいことも乗り越えちゃうんだから Fight!
subtitles.english: Because I'll overcome even painful things just to make it easy later, Fight!

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやらないためにやりたくないことやれ Fight!
subtitles.english: Do the things you don't want to do so you don't have to do the things you don't want to do, Fight!

subtitles.original: あれ？これって結局頑張れてる私とっても偉いじゃないか Fight!
subtitles.english: Huh? Doesn't this mean I'm actually doing my best? Aren't I great? Fight!
